title: Tree Barking
description: This mod adds bark for every type of log and wood in Minecraft.
body:
![Tree Barking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/598a6c644d0a27948371aee8a7fb41af58aa384d.png)
---
This mod adds bark for every type of log and wood in Minecraft perfect for builders who want smoother, more realistic trees, or for adding that extra rustic touch to your builds!

A config to this mod will come soon!

# ❓ Q&A

### Q: How do you obtain bark?

A: Simply strip any log with an axe and you’ll get the bark item as a drop.

### Q: What can i do with the bark?

A: Use the bark item on a stripped log to reattach it. The first use will partially restore it, and using it again will fully return it to the original log.

### Q: What versions are supported?

A: Check the list below.

# 📈 **Supported Versions**

- 1.20.1 - Not Supported
- 1.20.4 - **SUPPORTED**
- 1.20.6 - **SUPPORTED**
- 1.21.1 - **SUPPORTED**
- 1.21.4 - **SUPPORTED**
- 1.21.5 - **SUPPORTED**
